pr.title: Split out bombhei, dosei, and heart items
pr.author: r-burns

summary: Split item-specific assembly for bombhei, dosei, and heart out of the large generic item asm files into dedicated files under asm/melee/it/items, while moving capsule C/header into src/melee/it/items and updating build/include references. The PR was mostly mechanical organization: large code/data blocks were removed from asm/melee/it/it_27CF.s and asm/melee/it/it_803F5468.s and reintroduced in per-item asm files with their associated data, rodata, sdata, and sdata2 symbols.
what_changed: Removed roughly 7.8k lines from asm/melee/it/it_27CF.s and added new per-item assembly files: asm/melee/it/items/itbombhei.s, asm/melee/it/items/itdosei.s, and asm/melee/it/items/itheart.s.

Moved the data table beginning at it_803F54D8 out of asm/melee/it/it_803F5468.s and into the split item assembly, where it references functions such as it_8027DC74, it_8027DDE8, it_8027E018, it_8027EFD0, and related item callbacks.
Moved item-associated constants and strings such as it_804D51F0 "jobj.h", it_804D51F8 "jobj", it_804DC840, it_804DC844, it_804DC850, and later sdata2 constants into the new item asm files.

Updated obj_files.mk so the build uses src/melee/it/items/itcapsule.c.o and adds asm/melee/it/items/itbombhei.s.o, asm/melee/it/items/itdosei.s.o, and asm/melee/it/items/itheart.s.o before the remaining generic item asm objects.
Renamed src/melee/it/itcapsule.c and src/melee/it/itcapsule.h into src/melee/it/items/itcapsule.c and src/melee/it/items/itcapsule.h.
Updated include paths after moving capsule: src/melee/it/it_803F1418.c now includes <melee/it/items/itcapsule.h>, and itcapsule.c now includes generic item headers via <melee/it/...> paths.

Changed an internal local label .L_80284458 in it_27CF.s into global symbol it_80284458 and updated references to use it_80284458@ha/@l, apparently to keep a cross-file or table-visible target addressable after the split.
smart_moves: Kept the original address-derived symbol names while only changing file ownership, which preserves searchability and reduces risk in a mechanical asm split.
Updated obj_files.mk in the same PR as the split, avoiding orphaned assembly files or duplicate object ownership.
Co-located item callback tables, assertion strings, and floating-point constants with the split item assembly instead of leaving per-item data behind in generic data buckets.
Promoted the local label .L_80284458 to a global symbol when the split required a stable externally referenced label, a small but important asm hygiene step.
Moved capsule into the same items directory namespace as the newly split item asm, making the item subsystem layout more consistent.
decomp_lessons: For large item banks, a safe first step is often organizational: split contiguous item-specific asm and its data into per-item files before attempting C decompilation.
When splitting asm, move not only .text but also the related .data, .rodata, .sdata, and .sdata2 symbols; otherwise object ordering and symbol ownership can become unclear.
Build-order edits in obj_files.mk are part of the match. New per-item objects need to be inserted where the original monolithic object contributed those bytes.
Relative includes in moved C files should be converted to stable project include paths when the file moves into a deeper items directory.
Local labels that become referenced across the new file boundary need symbol promotion; leaving them as .L labels can break assembly/linking or obscure callback table references.
naming_conventions: Per-item assembly files use lowercase item names under asm/melee/it/items/: itbombhei.s, itdosei.s, itheart.s.
Moved item C files use the parallel source namespace src/melee/it/items/, as shown by itcapsule.c and itcapsule.h.
Existing address-based symbol names such as it_8027D670, it_803F54D8, it_804D51F0, and it_804DC840 were preserved during the split.
Project include paths for moved item files use <melee/it/items/itcapsule.h> for item-local headers and <melee/it/...> for shared item headers.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Mechanical asm extraction from asm/melee/it/it_27CF.s into new files while preserving instruction text and global labels.
Moved callback/data table it_803F54D8 alongside the split functions it points to, reducing cross-file data ownership ambiguity.
Relocated assertion strings and JObj-related sdata such as "jobj.h" and "jobj" with the asm that uses __assert and HSD_JObjSetMtxDirtySub.
Promoted .L_80284458 to it_80284458 and adjusted lis/addi relocations to use the global symbol form.
Preserved object ordering by adding the new item asm objects in obj_files.mk adjacent to the existing item asm objects.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR slice.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that decompile asm/melee/it/items/itbombhei.s into C.
Find later PRs that decompile asm/melee/it/items/itdosei.s into C.
Find later PRs that decompile asm/melee/it/items/itheart.s into C.
Search for further movement of item files under src/melee/it/items to confirm directory conventions.
Search for it_80284458 to see why the local label needed to become global after this split.
